title: batrachium heterophyllum
intro: Batrachium heterophyllum, also known as the marsh cress or yellow cress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Batrachium heterophyllum include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. It is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is also consumed as a nutritious addition to salads and other dishes.
